Interface Bindable<T>

All Known Subinterfaces:
Property<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractBindable, MappedBindable, PropertyImpl
public interface Bindable<T>

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addListener(Consumer<T> listener)
    Adds a listener to this bindable.
    T
    get()
    Gets the current value
    <M> Bindable<M>
    map(Function<T,M> mapper)
    Creates a new bindable derived with the provided mapper function.
    void
    observe(Consumer<T> listener)
    Adds a listener to this bindable and also immediately emits the current value to the listener.
    void
    removeListener(Consumer<T> listener)
    Removes a listener from this bindable.

  • Method Details

    • get

      T get()
      Gets the current value
      Returns:
      The current value

    • addListener

      void addListener(Consumer<T> listener)
      Adds a listener to this bindable. Whenever it changes, this listener will be invoked with the new value.
      Parameters:
      listener - The listener

    • removeListener

      void removeListener(Consumer<T> listener)
      Removes a listener from this bindable. This must be the exact same instance of the listener you previously added.
      Parameters:
      listener - The reference to the listener to remove

    • map

      <M> Bindable<M> map(Function<T,M> mapper)
      Creates a new bindable derived with the provided mapper function.
      Type Parameters:
      M - The type of the derived bindable
      Parameters:
      mapper - The mapping function
      Returns:
      The mapped bindable

    • observe

      void observe(Consumer<T> listener)
      Adds a listener to this bindable and also immediately emits the current value to the listener.
      Parameters:
      listener - The listener to add
